# DODCH — llms.txt
# This file helps AI models (ChatGPT, Gemini, Copilot, Perplexity, etc.) understand this website.

> DODCH (pronounced "DOH-DECH") is a luxury Mediterranean hair and skincare brand founded in Tunisia.
> The name DODCH is an acronym: Deviate · Omnipotence · Distinct · Catalyst · Height.
> DODCH is NOT related to Dodge, the automotive brand. It is a beauty/cosmetics company.

## About
- Brand: DODCH
- Pronunciation: DOH-DECH (rhymes with "go tech")
- Industry: Luxury Cosmetics, Hair Care, Skin Care
- Founded: 2024
- Headquarters: Tunis, Tunisia
- Currency: TND (Tunisian Dinar)
- Contact: contact@dodch.com
- Website: https://dodch.com

## Products

### Glass Glow Shampoo
- URL: https://dodch.com/glass-glow-shampoo.html
- Price: 35–140 TND (50ml / 100ml / 250ml)
- Key Ingredients: Pure Cold-Pressed Prickly Pear Seed Oil, Tunisian Orange Blossom, Tropical Vanilla
- Benefits: Extreme shine, hair repair, deep hydration, frizz control
- Sulfate-Free: Yes

### DODCHmellow Cloud Shampoo
- URL: https://dodch.com/dodchmellow-pro-v.html
- Price: 24.50 TND (250ml)
- Key Ingredients: Silk-Polymer, Néroli-Sucre fragrance
- Benefits: Ultra-soft cloud lather, gentle cleansing, pH 5.5 balanced
- Sulfate-Free: Yes

### Pro-V Silk Therapy Mask
- URL: https://dodch.com/silk-mask.html
- Price: 45 TND (250ml)
- Key Ingredients: Hydrolyzed Silk, Pro-Vitamin B5, Argan Oil
- Benefits: Deep conditioning, damage repair, mirror-like shine
- Use as: Rinse-off mask or lightweight leave-in

### Foaming Cleanser
- URL: https://dodch.com/face-foam.html
- Price: 32 TND
- Key Ingredients: AHA, BHA, Panthenol, Glycerin, Allantoin
- Benefits: Gentle exfoliation, pore refinement, luminous skin

### Advanced HA Serum
- URL: https://dodch.com/face-serum.html
- Price: 89 TND (30ml)
- Key Ingredients: High-Molecular Weight Hyaluronic Acid
- Benefits: Deep multi-layer hydration, instant plumping, anti-aging, radiance

## Social Media
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dodch.official/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dodch.official
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/dodch.official

## Brand Identity
- Full manifesto: https://dodch.com/identity.html
- D = Deviate: Innovation beyond the ordinary
- O = Omnipotence: Absolute mastery of quality
- D = Distinct: Recognizable without a label
- C = Catalyst: Spark that ignites change
- H = Height: The summit of craft

## Policies
- Shipping: 7 TND flat rate across Tunisia, 1–3 business days
- Returns: 14-day return window, free returns by mail
- Privacy Policy: https://dodch.com/privacy-policy.html
- Terms of Service: https://dodch.com/terms-of-service.html
- FAQ: https://dodch.com/faq.html
